hero.description: Regulatory compliance and specialized technical support for mining, construction, industry and infrastructure companies.

about.title: Experience and Commitment to Excellence
about.description1: CCONEX Constructores & Consultores is a Peruvian company with over 10 years of experience providing comprehensive technical solutions to the mining, construction, industry and infrastructure sectors.
about.description2: Our multidisciplinary team of engineers and specialists ensures regulatory compliance and quality in every project, backed by ISO certifications and a solid track record in the national market.

mision.title: Mission
mision.description: To provide comprehensive technical solutions in engineering, environment and industrial safety, ensuring regulatory compliance and customer satisfaction.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To be the leading consulting firm in Peru, recognized for our technical excellence, environmental commitment and contribution to the country's sustainable development.

valores.title: Values
valores.description: Punctuality, Commitment and Empathy. These principles guide every project and relationship with our clients and communities.

sectors.title: Sectors We Serve
sectors.description: Proven experience in Peru's most demanding sectors

mineria.name: Mining
mineria.description: Environmental management and safety for mining operations. Compliance with international standards and national regulations.

construccion.name: Construction
construccion.description: Technical consulting for civil works. Environmental impact control and site safety.

industria.name: Industry
industria.description: Integrated management systems and clean production for industrial plants.

energia.name: Energy
energia.description: Environmental impact studies and permits for energy projects.

retail.name: Retail
retail.description: Waste management and regulatory compliance for shopping centers and retail.

publico.name: Public Sector
publico.description: Consulting for government entities. Technical studies and citizen participation.

infraestructura.name: Infrastructure
infraestructura.description: Infrastructure projects with a sustainable focus and environmental compliance.

manufactura.name: Manufacturing
manufactura.description: Process optimization and industrial waste management for the manufacturing sector.

services.title: Our Services
services.description: Specialized technical solutions for every need

sanitarios.title: Portable Toilets
sanitarios.description: Rental of portable toilets for construction sites and projects with regular maintenance and sanitary compliance.

transporte.title: Waste Transport & Logistics
transporte.description: Specialized waste transport and logistics service with certified vehicles and trained personnel.

residuos.title: Waste Management
residuos.description: Comprehensive solutions for responsible solid waste management, complying with current environmental regulations.

valorizacion.title: Waste Valorization
valorizacion.description: Transformation of waste into raw materials or products with economic and environmental value.

equipos.title: Equipment
equipos.description: Rental and sale of specialized equipment for construction, mining and civil works projects.

ambiental.title: Environmental Management
ambiental.description: Comprehensive environmental consulting and solutions for companies and development projects.

seguridad.title: Occupational Health & Safety
seguridad.description: OHSAS, Law 29783, SUNAFIL audits, training, emergency plans and industrial safety.

ingenieria.title: Engineering & Architecture
ingenieria.description: Civil engineering, architecture, design, supervision and project management services.

plantaTratamiento.title: Mining Treatment Plant
plantaTratamiento.description: Implementation of wastewater treatment system for mining operations.

centroComercial.title: Green Shopping Center
centroComercial.description: LEED certification and waste management for sustainable shopping center.

plantaIndustrial.title: Eco Industrial Plant
plantaIndustrial.description: Implementation of clean production and circular economy in manufacturing plant.

estudioImpacto.title: Environmental Impact Study
estudioImpacto.description: EIA for high national impact road infrastructure project.

seguridadMinera.title: Comprehensive Mining Safety
seguridadMinera.description: OHSAS implementation and emergency plans for underground mine.

oficinasCorporativas.title: Corporate Offices
oficinasCorporativas.description: Design and implementation of integrated management systems for corporate building.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.description: Our clients' satisfaction is our best letter of introduction

items.name: Carlos Mendoza
items.content: CCONEX transformed our environmental management. Their technical team is exceptional and they met all regulatory deadlines. Highly recommended.

items.name: María Fernández
items.content: CCONEX's environmental consulting allowed us to obtain all the necessary permits for our infrastructure project. Professionalism and seriousness.

items.name: Roberto Sánchez
items.content: Thanks to CCONEX we achieved ISO 45001 certification in record time. Their knowledge of Peruvian regulations is unmatched.

items.name: Ana Torres
items.content: CCONEX's waste management service is impeccable. Punctual, professional and committed to the environment.

howWeWork.title: How We Work
howWeWork.description: A structured process that guarantees quality results

diagnostico.title: Diagnosis
diagnostico.description: Initial project assessment to identify needs, regulatory requirements and work scope.

inspeccion.title: Technical Inspection
inspeccion.description: Technical site visit to collect detailed information on current conditions and specific requirements.

propuesta.title: Proposal
propuesta.description: Detailed technical and economic proposal with defined timeline and scope.

ejecucion.title: Execution
ejecucion.description: Project development with periodic supervision, quality control and progress reports.

entrega.title: Delivery & Follow-up
entrega.description: Results delivery, documentation and post-project follow-up to ensure continued compliance.

certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.description: Backed by the most demanding international standards

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: We are ready to serve your project

footer.descripcion: Comprehensive Solutions in Engineering, Environmental Consulting and Industrial Safety. Over 10 years of experience supporting projects throughout Peru.
